nodes.name: Rockrunner
nodes.summary: Rockrunner（Achaetops pycnopygius）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rockrunner。

nodes.name: Rockrunner
nodes.summary: The rockrunner (Achaetops pycnopygius), also known as the Damara rock-jumper, is a species of African warbler, formerly placed in the family Sylviidae. It is the only member of the monotypic genus Achaetops. It is found in Angola and Namibia. References External links Rockrunner - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.

nodes.name: Austin Roberts (zoologist)
nodes.summary: Austin Roberts (3 January 1883 – 5 May 1948) was a South African zoologist.
